criteria.description: --level error filters to entries with level=error
criteria.verificationDetails: LevelFilter with single level tested by TestSF1_LevelFilterSingle (count + value assertion) and TestSF1_LevelFilterCaseInsensitive. Non-tautological with mixed-level test data.

criteria.description: --level warn,error filters to entries matching either level
criteria.verificationDetails: Multi-level filter tested by TestSF1_LevelFilterMultiple (3 results from 5 entries, each verified). Negative case TestSF1_LevelFilterNoMatch confirms zero results for absent level.

criteria.description: --from and --to filter by time range with RFC 3339 timestamps
criteria.verificationDetails: TimeRangeFilter tested by 4 tests: both bounds (inclusive), from-only, to-only, and explicit RFC3339 parsing via time.Parse. Open-ended ranges use zero-value time.Time.

KeywordFilter searches Level, Message, and string-typed Extra values. Tested across message (TestSF3_KeywordSearchMessage), extra fields (TestSF3_KeywordSearchExtraField), level (TestSF3_KeywordSearchLevel), case-insensitive (TestSF3_KeywordSearchCaseInsensitive), and no-match.

criteria.description: Multiple filters combine with AND semantics
criteria.verificationDetails: Apply() accepts variadic filters with short-circuit AND. Tested with 2-filter combo (TestSF5_CombineFiltersAND), 3-filter combo (TestSF5_CombineAllThreeFilters), and AND-producing-empty (TestSF5_CombineFiltersNoMatch).

verificationReports.summary: All 5 acceptance criteria pass. 16 tests cover all filter types with non-tautological assertions. Pre-flight clean: build, test, vet, gofmt all pass. Code quality good: doc comments on all exports, stdlib only, requirement IDs in test names.
